events.event_description: Embassy in Zanzibar established with Frederick P. Picard III as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: On December 10, 1963, the Embassy in Zanzibar was established with Frederick P. Picard III as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Embassy Zanzibar downgraded in rank to a Consulate General, effective June 27, 1964, following Zanzibar's union with Tanganyika on April 27, 1964.

evidence.quote: Frank C. Carlucci III was serving as Charge d'Affaires ad interim when Embassy Zanzibar was changed in rank to a Consulate General, effective June 27, 1964.
